rationale: The cited paper is used in the literature review as a prior empirical example in the seeding stream, specifically to note that influencer seeding may not benefit many creators in a music network. In the citing paper, this reference appears as background positioning (including one grouped citation list) and is not carried into the model setup, identification strategy, or empirical design. The citing paper does not explicitly build its framework from this specific study or directly test/extend its mechanism, so the citation functions as contextual mention rather than a substantive dependency.
